title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了模特的外貌、服饰、背景和拍摄角度，适合用于高端时尚杂志或品牌宣传，尤其是强调细腻质感和氛围感的营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了模特的外貌、服饰、背景和拍摄角度，适合用于高端时尚杂志或品牌宣传，尤其是强调细腻质感和氛围感的营销场景。
prompt_original: Create a photorealistic editorial portrait of one 20-year-old Japanese or Korean female portrait subject with white frame, thin-frame glasses, worn normally on the face, lenses aligned over the eyes and small teardrop gemstone earring detail, delicate understated sparkle, natural basic body, about 160-165 cm visual height, balanced torso-to-leg ratio around 4:6, young seductive alluring beauty face, magnetic feminine facial balance, defined eyes and lips, collarbone-length layered hair, airy natural volume, soft face-framing movement, soft black-tea brown hair, muted brown-black salon tone. She is sitting on a chair that naturally fits the current scene. The setting is British record listening corner, turntable setup, stacked vinyl sleeves, bookshelf speakers, aged wood cabinet, lamp fixture, small side table, indoor rainy-day daylight environment, dim grey window brightness. She wears gothic casual knit-and-ruffle outfit, fitted knit top, lace camisole layer, large ribbon bow, high-waist layered ruffle mini skirt. Inspired by Leslie Kee, polished commercial portrait image language. Camera positioned on the subject's left side, 90-degree left profile view, ultra shallow depth of field.
prompt_zh: 创建一张20岁左右的日韩女性写实肖像，白框细边眼镜正常佩戴在脸上，镜片对准眼睛，耳垂上戴着小巧的泪滴形宝石耳饰，散发出微妙而精致的光芒。她的身材自然，身高约160-165厘米，身体比例均衡（躯干与腿部的比例约为4:6），面部年轻、性感、迷人，具有磁性的女性魅力，眼睛和嘴唇轮廓清晰。头发长度到锁骨，层次分明，自然蓬松，柔和地贴合脸部，发色为淡茶棕色，带有哑光棕黑色调。她坐在一把自然融入当前场景的椅子上。背景设定为英式唱片聆听角落，配有转盘、堆叠的黑胶唱片套、书架音箱、旧木柜、灯具、小边桌，室内环境是雨天日光，窗户透进昏暗的灰色光线。她穿着哥特风格的休闲针织和褶边服装，包括紧身针织上衣、蕾丝吊带层、大蝴蝶结、高腰层叠褶边迷你裙。灵感来自Leslie Kee的商业肖像摄影语言。相机位于被摄对象左侧，90度侧视图，极浅景深。
